title: 責められるべきはトレーナー？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To prepare for the Tenno Sho, Mejiro McQueen's
training regimen has been anchored around the
basics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Onlookers and other trainers cast a critical eye
over us. To them, the regimen doesn't seem
practical for garnering success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In turn, things become a bit strained between
Mejiro McQueen and I.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This troubles her. However, she soon realizes she
can trust me after speaking with Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We renew our faith in each other and the promise
we share, returning to the path we set for the
Tenno Sho.
